evals.prompt: I'm getting ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'vnstock_data' when running my script.
evals.expected_output: Agent should run diagnostics.py, identify the missing dependency, ensure the user is in a venv, and install the library.

assertions.name: Venv Check
assertions.description: Ensures the agent checks for a virtual environment before installing.

evals.prompt: Giúp mình chuẩn bị môi trường cho dự án dùng vnstock bản free nhé.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates a virtual environment, installs requirements.txt, and pip installs vnstock -U.

assertions.name: Free Tier Installation
assertions.description: Verifies the agent installs the free 'vnstock' package and not 'vnstock_data'.

evals.prompt: Cài đặt lại agent guide mới nhất giúp mình, hình như bị lỗi rồi. Thư mục docs đã có sẵn.
evals.expected_output: Agent MUST ask for permission to overwrite the existing docs/ directory before proceeding.

assertions.name: Overwrite Permission
assertions.description: Ensures the agent gets explicit permission to overwrite.
